description_long: This rifle features a compact design with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden handguard and a curved, reddish-brown detachable magazine. The stock is a skeletonized, folding metal type, providing both stability and portability. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights, and the muzzle is fitted with a flash hider. The trigger, magazine release, and safety selector are all visible and accessible, typical of modern assault rifles. The overall finish is a mix of matte black metal and polished wood, giving it a rugged yet classic appearance.
description: A compact rifle with a black metal body, wooden handguard, curved magazine, and a folding skeletonized stock. It features iron sights and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden handguard, curved magazine, folding skeletonized stock, and overall profile.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear sight, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and the folding stock mechanism.
